Nrid MINISTRY OF WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the'16th March, 2006 S.O. 353(E).—In pursuance of Sub-section (2) of Section 4 of the National Commission forWomenAct, 1990, the Government of India accepts the resignation tendered by Sushila Tiriya as Member of the National - Commission for Women With effect from 16th March, 2006.
